calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 19,2002
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler; Bailiff: R. Guitron. Plaintiff was represented by Andrew Westley, Esq. Exhibit #1 - Expense calculations was marked for identification. The Court takes evidence and denies the petition for Order Amending Judgment.
